install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip gcc g++ && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install cython scipy requests pillow
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn as l2l; print('learn2learn version:', l2l.__version__); print('location:', l2l.__file__)"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.MiniImagenet(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='train', download=True); print('mini-imagenet train:', len(d))"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.MiniImagenet(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='validation', download=True); print('mini-imagenet val:', len(d))"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.MiniImagenet(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='test', download=True); print('mini-imagenet test:', len(d))"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.CIFARFS(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='train', download=True); print('cifar-fs train:', len(d))"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.CIFARFS(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='validation', download=True); print('cifar-fs val:', len(d))"
cd /tmp && python -c "import learn2learn.vision.datasets as ds; d = ds.CIFARFS(root='/workspace/l2l_data', mode='test', download=True); print('cifar-fs test:', len(d))"

cd /tmp && python -c "from learn2learn.vision.models import CNN4Backbone; import torch; m = CNN4Backbone(hidden_size=64, channels=3, max_pool=True); print('CNN4 output:', m(torch.randn(1,3,84,84)).shape); print('Package ready')"
